artPrompt: An ongoing enchantment scene composed vertically: a pair of scattered dice glow faintly on a beige countertop while spectral tendrils of pale arcane light siphon upward from them into a towering stamped form looming above in shadow. Rubber stamps and a ticket dispenser flank the foreground. A single municipal light source rakes across the surface, the rest swallowed in gloom, rendered as a moody oil painting — old-master chiaroscuro, visible impasto brushwork, deep shadow, warm varnished tones.
name: Dice-Roll Surcharge
text: Whenever an opponent rolls one or more dice, you draw a card. (Recreational randomness is a taxable event.)
flavorText: Schedule D, line 6: "Income derived from other people's fun."
